originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Redesigning Acquisition Function and Cost Penalty for Carbs Hyperparameter Tuning
summary: Worked on redesigning the carbs hyperparameter tuning algorithm, modifying the acquisition function with conservative bounds and a cost penalty term. The new algorithm achieved near-optimal performance on a synthetic benchmark but showed quirks on real RL tasks like Pong and Breakout.
